SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccessibilityPreferences
 
AdminCommentAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for admin-side comment moderation.
AdminCommentAdapter.OnDeleteCommentListener
 
AdminDevice
Represents a device installation that has been explicitly granted or denied administrator access.
AdminEventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events, typically for administrative purposes.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Listener interface for handling the click event on an event item.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventDeleteListener
Listener interface for handling the delete button click on an event item.
AdminEventAdapter.OnViewOrganizerListener
Listener interface for handling the "View Organizer" button click on an event item.
AdminFragment
Fragment for administrative tasks: managing all events, users, uploaded images, and the notification audit log.
AdminGeolocationTestService
Seeds deterministic geolocation test data so admins can verify location capture and map views on a single device without needing a second session.
AdminGeolocationTestService.SandboxState
 
AdminImageAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying event poster images in the admin panel.
AdminImageAdapter.OnImageDeleteListener
 
AdminNotificationAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for the admin notification audit log.
AdminNotificationAdapter.OnNotificationLongPressListener
 
AdminNotificationTestService
Seeds deterministic notification test data for admins and drives real notification flows against that sandbox using the existing repository and notification services.
AdminNotificationTestService.SandboxState
 
AuthDeviceService
Service class handling device authentication using Firebase Auth.
CommentRepository
Repository interface for event comment persistence operations.
CommentService
 
EntrantEventService
Service for entrant-side event participation: joining/leaving the waiting list, accepting/declining invitations, and querying the current user's entry status.
EntrantMapFragment
 
Event
Domain model for a Helios event.
EventAdapter
 
EventAdapter.OnCoOrganizerInviteActionListener
 
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
 
EventAdapter.OnPrivateEventInviteActionListener
 
EventBrowseFilter
 
EventBrowseFilter.AvailabilityFilter
 
EventBrowseFilter.CapacityFilter
 
EventBrowseFilter.Result
 
EventBrowseFilter.VisibilityFilter
 
EventComment
Represents a comment made on a specific event.
EventCommentsAdapter
 
EventCommentsAdapter.CommentActionListener
 
EventDetailsBottomSheet
 
EventDiscoveryInsights
 
EventDiscoveryInsights.Result
 
EventRepository
Repository interface for event persistence operations.
EventService
Service for event CRUD operations, delegating to EventRepository.
EventsFragment
 
EventUiFormatter
 
EventUserPickerFragment
Reusable user picker for event-scoped actions (e.g., invite to private event, assign co-organizer).
EventUserPickerFragment.Mode
 
FirebaseRepository
Repository class responsible for interacting with Firebase Firestore.
GeoPoint
Represents a geographical point with latitude and longitude coordinates.
HeliosApplication
 
HeliosChipFactory
 
HeliosFirebaseMessagingService
 
HeliosFontOption
 
HeliosHeaderBranding
 
HeliosImageUploader
 
HeliosImageUploader.ImageUploadException
 
HeliosImageUploader.UploadResult
 
HeliosLocation
Shared helpers for Android foreground location access.
HeliosText
 
HeliosThemeManager
 
HeliosThemeOption
 
HeliosUi
 
HeliosUiPreferences
 
ImageAsset
Metadata record for an uploaded image resource such as an event poster.
ImageRepository
Repository interface for image/poster persistence operations.
ImageService
Service for admin-side image management.
InstallationIdProvider
Utility class that persists a locally generated installation identifier in SharedPreferences.
LauncherActivity
The entry point activity of the application.
LotteryService
 
MainActivity
The main activity of the application.
ManageEventFragment
 
NotificationAdapter
 
NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
 
NotificationAudience
Describes the intended audience for a notification record.
NotificationRecord
Represents a notification record in the Helios application.
NotificationRepository
Repository interface for notification persistence operations.
NotificationSendResult
 
NotificationsFragment
 
NotifyEntrantsFragment
 
OrganizeFragment
 
OrganizerNotificationService
Centralizes organizer triggered notification behavior Service gives us one organizer side place to : 1.
OrganizerQrFragment
Fragment that displays the QR code for an event.
OrganizerViewEntrantsFragment
Fragment that allows an organizer to view and manage the list of entrants for an event.
ProfileEventHistoryAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for the profile event history lists.
ProfileEventHistoryAdapter.HistoryItem
 
ProfileEventHistoryAdapter.OnHistoryClickListener
 
ProfileFragment
Fragment that displays the user's profile information.
ProfileService
Service responsible for user profile bootstrap, completion, role synchronization, and notification/sign-in preferences for the current device user.
ProfileService.BootstrapResult
 
ProfileService.InstallationIdSource
Result object for the profile bootstrapping process.
ProfileSetupActivity
Activity for setting up or editing a user profile.
ScanQrFragment
Fragment that provides QR code scanning functionality.
SetupEventFragment
 
ThemedActivity
 
UserAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of users, typically for administrative purposes.
UserAdapter.OnUserClickListener
Listener interface for handling the click event on a user item.
UserAdapter.OnUserDeleteListener
Listener interface for handling the delete button click on a user item.
UserAdapter.OnViewEventsListener
Listener interface for handling the "View Events" button click on a user item.
UserProfile
Represents a user profile in the Helios application.
UserRepository
Repository interface for user profile persistence operations.
WaitingListEntry
Represents one entrant's state within a single event waiting list.
WaitingListRepository
Repository interface for waiting list persistence operations.
WaitingListService
Service for organizer-side waiting-list operations: retrieval, updates, invitations, cancellations, and auto-replacement draws.
WaitingListStatus
Enumeration representing the possible statuses of an entrant in a waiting list.
